receipt Invoice {{ invoiceInfo.invoice_number || '#—' }} {{ invoiceStatusLabel }}

discount Credit Applied − ${{ (invoiceInfo.credit_applied || 0) | number:'1.2-2' }}
Balance Due ${{ balanceDue | number:'1.2-2' }}
Description Qty Unit Total
{{ item.description || item.name }} {{ item.quantity || 1 }} ${{ (item.unit_price || 0) | number:'1.2-2' }} ${{ (item.line_total || item.amount || 0) | number:'1.2-2' }}
Tax ${{ (invoiceInfo.tax_amount || 0) | number:'1.2-2' }}
Total ${{ (invoiceInfo.total_amount || 0) | number:'1.2-2' }}
Balance Due ${{ balanceDue | number:'1.2-2' }}
